review_notes: The functions generally map well to the control SC-7(11) by focusing on restricting incoming traffic through NetworkPolicies and service configurations. Naming conventions are mostly followed, but minor improvements can be made for clarity and consistency.
naming_improvements: Consider renaming 'k8s_networkpolicy_restrict_ingress_to_whitelist' to 'k8s_networkpolicy_ingress_whitelist_only' for better clarity and alignment with naming conventions.
title: Boundary Protection - Boundary protection | restrict incoming communications traffic only allow incomi
step1_reasoning: The control SC-7(11) focuses on restricting incoming communications traffic, which directly maps to Kubernetes NetworkPolicies and service configurations. NetworkPolicies can enforce a default deny-all ingress policy and allow only specific traffic, similar to cloud security groups and NACLs. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services and ensuring TLS is enabled for Ingress resources aligns with the control's intent to protect boundaries.
